gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/438)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/438)

parts.text: يَحْيَى بْنِ عَمْرِو بْنِ خَلِيفَةَ الزَّيَّاتِ

text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يَا مَعْشَرَ الشَّبَابِ عَلَيْكُمْ بِالْبَاهِ فَإِنْ لَمْ تَسْتَطِيعُوهُ فَعَلَيْكُمْ بِالصِّيَامِ فَإِنَّهُ وِجَاؤُهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Yahya Bin Amro Bin Khaleefa Al Zayyat, from Abdullah Bin Bukeyr, from one of our companions,

(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5<sup>th</sup> or 6<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘O group of youths! It is upon you with the marital relationship. So if you are not in a position to do so, upon you is with the Fasting, for it is its subduer’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Yahya ibn ‘Amr ibn Khalifah al-Zayyat from ‘Abd Allah ibn Bukayr from certain individuals of our people who has said the following: “One of the two Imam, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, has stated this Hadith. ‘The Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, has said, “O young people, you may have carnal relations. If you are unable to do so, you should fast; it has a castrating effect (on carnal desires).””’
